titleStmt.title: SII 16.2: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 2. (A.R. No. 500 of 1906.) MŌPŪR, PULIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the Vibhūti-maṇḍapa of the Bhairavēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1275, Vijaya, Phālguṇa ba. 5, Monday, corresponding to 1354 A.D., March 14. The weekday, however, was Friday. The date falls in the reign of Harihara I.
It records a gift of the village Aluvala as śrōtriya-sarvamānya to Sahajaḍaṁbu Ayyagāru by Sāvamṇṇa Oḍeya for the merit of his father Kaṁppaṇṇa Oḍeya and his mother Meṅgādēvi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1275 Agunēṁṭi vijaya
saṁvatsara pālguṇa ba 5 sō svasti śrīmaṁ
mmahāmaṁḍalēśvara harirāyavibhā
ḷa bhāsege lappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū
rvvasamudrādhipati vīraśrī sāvaṁṇna O
ḍayalu tama taṁḍri kaṁppaṁṇna Oḍayulaku
nnu tama talli meṁgādēvi Aṁmmagārikiṁni puṁ
ṇyamugānu bayirapadēvara saṁnnidhini śāṁttasu
brahmacāri Ayisa śrīsiddhayōgīśvaru
laisa sahajaḍaṁbu Ayagārikini Alu
vala Ūru śrītriyya sarvvamāṁnyamugānu
siddhapātra bhikṣānaku Ācaṁdrārkkastā
Igānu dhārāpūrvvakamusēsi
Istimi I dhaṁrmmāsaku yevva
ru vighnamaInāsu gaṁgakaṟata
kavula boḍbina pāpāna bōIna
vāru peddakoḍku kapāḷāna kāṭika
vaṭṭina pāpāna bōIsavāru
maṁgaḷamahāśrī stānaṁ
karaṇaṁ bayyasavrālu .
Digital edition of SII 16.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
